• Interactive digital Magic 8 Ball with 3D particle effects and shaking animations.
  • 5 selectable answer personalities: friendly, mean, silly, dramatic, roast.
  • Generates concise AI-powered responses via the OpenRouter API for user questions.
    magicBall.classList.add('is-shaking');
    responseText.textContent = text;

This web app simulates a classic Magic 8 Ball with interactive 3D visuals and animations. Users input questions, select a response personality, and receive short AI-generated answers inside the animated ball. It uses Three.js for 3D effects, Tailwind CSS for styling, and the OpenRouter API for dynamic responses.
